2605.09384.title: LiteMedCoT-VL: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation for Medical Visual Question Answering
2605.09384.paper_summary: The reasoning gap between large and compact vision-language models (VLMs) limits the deployment of medical AI on portable clinical devices. Compact VLMs of 2--4B parameters can run on resource-constrained hardware but lack the multi-step reasoning capacity needed for interpretable clinical decision support. Existing knowledge distillation methods transfer answers without the reasoning process behind them. Medical visual question answering (VQA) serves as a testbed for this problem, as it requires models to integrate visual evidence with clinical knowledge through structured reasoning chains. We introduce LiteMedCoT-VL, a pipeline that transfers chain-of-thought reasoning from a 235B teacher model to 2B student models through LoRA-based fine-tuning on explanation-enriched training data. All inference is conducted without image captions by default, simulating the clinical scenario in which a physician interprets a medical image directly without an accompanying radiology report. On the PMC-VQA benchmark, LiteMedCoT-VL achieves 64.9% accuracy, exceeding the zero-shot Qwen3-VL-4B baseline of 53.9% by 11.0 percentage points and outperforming all published baselines. This result indicates that a 2B model with reasoning distillation can match or exceed models with twice the parameters. Visual grounding analysis shows that the model relies on image content rather than exploiting textual priors. Our code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LiteMedCoT-VL.
2605.09384.paper_summary_zh: 大型與緊湊型視覺語言模型（VLMs）之間的推理差距限制了醫療AI在便攜式臨床設備上的部署。擁有2至4億參數的緊湊型VLM可以在資源受限的硬體上運行，但缺乏可解釋的臨床決策支持所需的多步推理能力。現有的知識蒸餾方法僅轉移答案，而未考慮其背後的推理過程。醫療視覺問題回答（VQA）作為此問題的測試平台，因為它要求模型通過結構化推理鏈整合視覺證據與臨床知識。我們介紹了LiteMedCoT-VL，這是一個將235B教師模型的思維鏈推理轉移到2B學生模型的流程，通過基於LoRA的微調在增強解釋的訓練數據上進行。所有推理默認情況下不進行圖像標題，模擬醫生直接解釋醫療影像而不附帶放射學報告的臨床場景。在PMC-VQA基準上，LiteMedCoT-VL達到了64.9%的準確率，超過了53.9%的零樣本Qwen3-VL-4B基線11.0個百分點，並且超越了所有已發表的基線。這一結果表明，具有推理蒸餾的2B模型可以匹配或超越參數數量為兩倍的模型。視覺基礎分析顯示該模型依賴於圖像內容，而不是利用文本先驗。我們的代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LiteMedCoT-VL 上公開獲取。
2605.09384.author: Runze Ma et.al.
2605.09384.authors: Runze Ma, Shunbo Jia, Haonan Lyu, Guo Liu, Caizhi Liao
